allowLanguageSynchronization.description: Allows to select if localization uses custom or default language value

default.description: Default value set if a new record is created.

exclusiveKeys.description: List of keys that exclude any other keys in a select box where multiple items could be selected.

foreign_table_where.description: The items from foreign_table are selected with this WHERE clause.

maxitems.description: Maximum number of items allowed in the select field

minitems.description: Minimum number of items allowed in the select field

readOnly.description: Renders the field in a way that the user can see the value but cannot edit it.

size.description: Maximal number of elements to be displayed in the tree by default

dataProvider.description: Allows to define a custom data provider class for use cases where special data preparation is necessary.

startingPoints.description: Allows to set multiple records as roots for tree records.

showHeader.description: Whether to show the header of the tree that contains a field to filter the records and allows to expand or collapse all nodes.

expandAll.description: All select groups are initially expanded.

maxLevels.description: The maximal amount of levels to be rendered (can be used to stop possible recursions)

nonSelectableLevels.description: Comma-separated list of levels that will not be selectable, by default the root node (which is "0") cannot be selected
